description_long: This is a medium-sized, clear plastic bottle filled with an orange-brown liquid, likely juice, and sealed with a light gray screw cap. The bottle has a gently curved, ergonomic shape for easy gripping, and its surface is glossy, reflecting light. The front label features vibrant images of pomegranates and green leaves, along with branding and product information in bold, colorful fonts. The back and sides display nutritional facts, barcodes, and additional product details in smaller, monochrome text. The cap has a printed design, possibly a logo or fruit image, and the bottle appears to be completely filled with liquid. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle is clean and intact.
description: A clear, curved plastic bottle with a gray screw cap, filled with orange-brown liquid and decorated with colorful fruit-themed labels and branding.
description_view_0: The back view shows the nutritional information and barcode in black and white text, with the orange-brown liquid visible through the clear plastic.
description_view_1: This side view displays a partial product label with branding text and a logo, along with some nutritional details.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the main label with vibrant pomegranate imagery, green leaves, and prominent branding.
description_view_3: This view shows the side of the bottle with a partial fruit image and additional product information, as well as the cap's printed design.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a prominent front label with images of pomegranates, green leaves, and bold branding text. Additional labels on the sides and back display nutritional information, barcodes, and product details in black and white. The cap has a printed design, possibly a logo or fruit image.
